queries.question: Show all the ETP records, in addition show the UIT records with an exit fee of 0.01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Products.Name 
FROM Products
WHERE Products.Category = "ETP" OR Products.Category = "UIT" AND Products.ExitFee = 0.01
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?products a :Products .
  ?products p:name ?name .
  ?products p:Category ?category_w .
  ?products p:Category ?category_w2 .
  ?products p:ExitFee ?exitfee_w .
  FILTER((STR(?category_w) = "ETP" || (STR(?category_w2) = "UIT" && (STR(?exitfee_w) = "0.01"))))
}

queries.question: List all entries for both ETPs and UITs where the exit fee is 0.01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Products.Name 
FROM Products
WHERE (Products.Category = "ETP" OR Products.Category = "UIT") AND Products.ExitFee = 0.01
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?products a :Products .
  ?products p:name ?name .
  ?products p:Category ?category_w .
  ?products p:Category ?category_w2 .
  ?products p:ExitFee ?exitfee_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?category_w) = "ETP" || STR(?category_w2) = "UIT")) && (STR(?exitfee_w) = "0.01")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all ETPs and UITs where the exit fee is 0.01.
